Endo SurgeryREF: MRL-HRP-001

PROFOUND A - Absorbable Mesh Fixation Device 5mm

PROFOUND A · Hernia Mesh

Poly(lactide-co-glycolide) powered absorbable mesh fixation device for laparoscopic hernia repair

MaterialPoly(lactide-co-glycolide)
Frequently Asked Questions

Poly(lactide-co-glycolide) powered absorbable mesh fixation device for laparoscopic hernia repair

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the PROFOUND A - Absorbable Mesh Fixation Device 5mm, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The PROFOUND A - Absorbable Mesh Fixation Device 5mm is constructed using Poly(lactide-co-glycolide), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
